description: Persist side panel accordion expand/collapse state across open/close cycles using chrome.storage.session. When the side panel is closed and reopened within a browser session, previously expanded plugin cards and browser tools card remain expanded instead of resetting to all-collapsed.

userStories.title: Persist plugin accordion expand/collapse state in PluginList
userStories.description: Store the openReady and openNotReady accordion arrays in chrome.storage.session so they survive side panel close/reopen. On mount, hydrate from storage. On change, write to storage (debounced). Stale plugin names that no longer exist in the list are harmless — Radix ignores accordion values that don't match any Item.
acceptanceCriteria: openReady and openNotReady arrays are read from chrome.storage.session on mount
Accordion value changes are persisted to chrome.storage.session with debounce
Expanding a plugin card, closing the side panel, and reopening shows the card still expanded
Plugin names that no longer exist in the list do not cause errors (Radix ignores unmatched values)
The collapseTransitioningItems logic still collapses cards during group transitions
Filtering mode (search active) does not read from or write to storage

userStories.title: Persist browser tools accordion expand/collapse state in App.tsx
userStories.description: The BrowserToolsCard accordion in App.tsx is currently uncontrolled (no value/onValueChange). Convert it to controlled mode and persist its expand state to chrome.storage.session alongside the plugin accordion state.
acceptanceCriteria: BrowserToolsCard accordion wrapper in App.tsx uses controlled value/onValueChange
Expanding the Browser card, closing side panel, and reopening shows it still expanded
The stored key is 'browserToolsOpen' in chrome.storage.session, storing a boolean
Default state is collapsed (false) when storage is empty

userStories.title: E2E test: accordion expand state persists across side panel close/reopen
userStories.description: Add an E2E test that verifies expanding plugin cards and the browser tools card, closing the side panel, and reopening it shows the cards still expanded. Uses chrome.storage.session to persist state.
acceptanceCriteria: Test opens side panel, expands e2e-test plugin card and browser tools card
Test closes the side panel page
Test reopens the side panel page (new page navigating to side-panel.html)
Test verifies both cards are still expanded (aria-expanded='true')
Test verifies collapsing a card, closing, and reopening shows it collapsed
